settings.heading: A stronger wellness routine starts with formulas customers believe in.
settings.quote: When you remove clutter and give pet parents a clear reason to trust the routine, compliance improves and outcomes follow.
settings.name: Dr. Sarah Jenkins
settings.body: Nuumipet keeps expert guidance visible without turning the experience cold. Clear routines, credible ingredients, and practical reassurance help pet parents commit with confidence.

settings.title: Formula-first positioning
settings.text: Every formula leads with a clear benefit, a believable ingredient story, and language customers can understand at a glance.

settings.title: Manufacturing transparency
settings.text: Manufacturing quality, sourcing standards, and the guarantee stay visible where trust matters most, right near the buying decision.

settings.title: Built for repeatable routines
settings.text: The daily routine feels simple enough to stick with, while the brand still reads premium, credible, and calm.

settings.heading: Designed to feel calmer, clearer, and more premium at every scroll depth.
settings.description: These three cards explain why the Nuumipet routine feels easier to trust: cleaner formulas, clearer proof, and habits pet parents can actually keep.

settings.title: Ingredient stories should feel evidence-led, not inflated.
settings.text: Each formula explains what it supports, why the ingredients matter, and how the routine fits into everyday pet care without guesswork.

settings.title: Proof belongs beside the value proposition, not buried beneath it.
settings.text: Guarantees, manufacturing quality, and brand reassurance stay close to the offer so confidence builds without extra digging.

settings.title: Make every daily routine look easier to start and easier to sustain.
settings.text: The routine feels realistic for busy households, making it easier for pet parents to start, stay consistent, and feel good about the choice.

settings.heading: Answer the questions that usually slow checkout decisions.
settings.description: Give pet parents direct answers on timing, consistency, and confidence so they can move from interest to checkout without hesitation.

settings.question: How quickly should customers expect to see results?
settings.answer: Most pet parents should expect a gradual change over a few weeks of consistent daily use. The clearest results come when the routine stays steady.

settings.question: Can these answers be updated later?
settings.answer: Yes. Every FAQ item can be edited, reordered, added, or removed directly in the Theme Editor as the offer or messaging evolves.

settings.question: Where should guarantees and trust claims be repeated?
settings.answer: Repeat them close to the buy decision, inside proof sections, and again near the end of the page so confidence stays high all the way through checkout.
